title: gbfs-toolkit: research-grade ingestion and semantic quality audit for GBFS feeds
description: A Python toolkit that ingests GBFS bike-share feeds into a stable, version-independent data model (StationInfo / StationStatus / VehicleStatus) and audits their semantic quality with the A1–A7 taxonomy of Fossé & Pallares — the semantic counterpart to MobilityData's syntactic gbfs-validator. It consolidates feed discovery (the MobilityData systems catalogue), cross-version normalisation (GBFS 2.x/3.x), and the published quality-audit pipeline into one tested, installable interface for reuse across shared-mobility research. v0.1 ships the canonical model, catalogue discovery, normalisation, the static A1–A7 audit, and a CLI (gbfs audit).
